so we can officially make the viral dot cake at home and it’s my new favorite little treat 🧁🌈 Ingredients: 1 box @Funfetti cake mix 3 eggs 1 cup water 1/2 cup oil funfetti vanilla frosting rainbow nonpareils sprinkles Instructions: In a large mixing bowl, mix cake mix, eggs, water, and oil until well combined and transfer to a greased square baking pan. Bake at 350° for 35-40 minutes, covering with foil halfway through. Allow to cool completely, then press greased ramekin into the center and twist to remove. Allow mini cake to slide out of ramekin and slice through the center to create 2 layers. Place bottom layer back in ramekin, top with a layer of frosting, then place top layer of cake with another layer of frosting spread evenly to the edges. Cover in rainbow nonpareils, allow to chill and slightly harden in the fridge, then take a center bite and enjoy! 😋 #cake #Recipe #baking #dessert #creatorsearchinsights

The Bengal 🐆cat is a unique domestic breed known for its wild leopard-like appearance and highly active personality. Its coat features striking spotted or marbled patterns that resemble a miniature wild cat, making it one of the most visually exotic cat breeds in the world. Despite its wild look, the Bengal is fully domestic and forms strong bonds with its owner. This breed is highly intelligent, curious, and energetic. Bengals enjoy climbing, exploring, and interactive play, and they require mental stimulation to stay happy. They are social cats that can be very affectionate, but they also demand attention and an engaging environment. When properly cared for, the Bengal cat becomes a loyal, entertaining, and dynamic companion 🫶🏼 #bengalcat #bengalkitten #bengalkedisi #bengalcats #fypage

Bulgarian split squats will humble you every single time 😭 but if you want stronger glutes, toned legs, better balance, and that sculpted lower body look… you can’t skip them. One leg at a time means no cheating, no relying on your stronger side, just pure growth and stability. They burn like crazy but the results speak for themselves 🍑 Save this workout and add it to your next leg day if you’re serious about building those glutes and leveling up your physique. #bulgariansplitsquats #glutegrowth #legdayworkout #fitnessgirl #GymTok

RASPBERRY TIRAMISU 💕✨ Welcome to Episode 17 of my tiramisu series! This Raspberry Tiramisu aka Raspberrymisu is long overdue, and my most requested flavor! It has definitely earned a spot up there. From the vibrant pink and sweet and sour flavors from the berries it’s hard not to love this dessert. It has a layer of raspberry mascarpone cream, raspberry dipped ladyfingers and a raspberry sauce topping. It’s a raspberry dream 😍 Add it to your summer dessert list ASAP. Ingredients  - 3/4 cup of homemade raspberry juice  - 1 ½ cups of heavy cream or double cream - 16 oz or 450g of mascarpone cheese - ¾ cup of granulated sugar - 1 teaspoons of vanilla extract - 260 g of Ladyfingers or enough to fill the dish Topping - Homemade raspberry sauce  - Fresh raspberries for topping  - Mint leaves for garnish  #raspberrytiramisu #raspberrydessert #uniquedesserts #tiramisunoegg  #adesserttomakeanydayspecial

(영상에 나오는 제가 직접 상담, 무료 현장 방문합니다!) #신안철거 팔로우 해주시고 앞으로도 자주 뵈어요. 감사합니다!😊

So fluffy & delicious!🤎 Recipe below👇🏼  🍩 Ingredients Dough: * 300g strong white bread flour * 30g caster sugar * 1/2 tsp salt * 7g fast-action yeast * 2 eggs * 75ml warm milk * 50g melted butter Chocolate Pastry Cream: * 540g whole milk * 2 tsp vanilla extract * 18g cocoa powder * 2 eggs * 2 egg yolks * 100g brown sugar * 25g cornstarch * ¼ tsp sea salt * 170g milk chocolate, chopped * 30g butter 🧾Instructions 1. Make the Dough Mix flour, sugar, salt, and yeast in a bowl. Add eggs, warm milk, and melted butter. Knead until elastic by hand or in mixer. Cover and let rise for 1 hour. 2. Shape & Proof Punch down the dough and divide into 65g portions. Roll each piece into a smooth ball and place onto individual squares of baking paper. Arrange on a tray, cover loosely, and let rise for another hour.  3. Make Chocolate Cream Heat milk and vanilla until steaming. In a bowl, whisk cocoa, eggs, yolks, sugar, cornstarch, and salt. Slowly add the hot milk while whisking constantly, then return to pan and cook until thick & bubbling. Off heat, stir in chocolate and butter. Chill with plastic wrap touching the surface. 4. Fry the Donuts Fry donuts in hot oil. Fry until golden. Drain and roll in sugar. 5. Fill Transfer the chilled chocolate pastry cream to a piping bag fitted with a round nozzle. Poke a small hole in the side of each donut and pipe in the filling generously.  Enjoy! 🤎 #baking #donuts #donutlover #chocolatedonut #explore #baketok #dessert #sweettreat #bomboloni #aesthetic #trending #viral #Recipe #bakingtherapy #asmr #lanadelrey #pinterest #girltherapy #imjustgirl

Recipe below!👇🏼Why spend at M&S when you can make it at home and even better 🍓☀️ ⭐️ Ingredients: - 6-8 fresh strawberries (preferably similar size) - 4 slices of soft white bread (crustless milk bread if possible) - 200ml double cream - 2 tbsp sugar - 1/2 tsp vanilla extract (optional) ⭐️ Method： 1. Wash strawberries. 2. Beat heavy cream with sugar (and vanilla if using) until stiff peaks form. 3. Spread whipped cream on bread, place strawberries, cover with more cream, and top with another bread slice. 4. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap and chill for 30 minutes. 5. Slice cleanly and enjoy! #sando #strawberrysando #strawberries #strawberriesandcream #aesthetic #trending #marksandspencer #viral #fyp #baking #baketok #dessert #explore #Recipe #EasyRecipe

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

Classic chocolate chip cookies 🤤 Yields: 15-16 Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 75-80g balls. •Place the cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 165-170C. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream. NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #chocolate #fyp #explorepage✨ #viralvideos

No ad!! ✨Anua RATING by Korean pharmacist 🇰🇷 1️⃣ Heartleaf Pore Control Cleansing Oil ✔️2/10 fragrance is a bit much.  risky for acne-prone skin. 2️⃣Heartleaf Quercetinol Pore Deep Cleansing Foam ✔️8/10 the BHA in this is great for acne anf clogged pores 3️⃣Heartleaf 77% Soothing Toner ✔️6/10 super easy But there’s many alternatives in the market 4️⃣Niacinamide 10 + TXA 4 Serum ✔️3/10 too aggressive for my sensitive skin ,Broke me out😭 5️⃣Azelaic Acid 10 Hyaluron Redness Soothing Serum ✔️10/10 Azelaic acid for redness and bumps, hyaluronic acid to buffer it. Very smart. 6️⃣PDRN Collagen Melting Patch For Glass Skin ✔️2/10 Cute, but no. Topical collagen mostly doesn’t penetrate the skin well. 7️⃣PDRN hyaluronic capsule 100 serum ✔️9/10 You have to try this already on my 4th bottle:)  #skincare #anua @anua_global #kbeautyskincareproducts #anua#beautytips
